sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58620" key="kollou/ra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολλούρ-α</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58620.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roll</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loaf</tr_> of bread(?), <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:2172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2172</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κολλύρα</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
